title: Quick-Fix protected-surface overlay (ADOPTER, additive-only)
description: Validates an adopter overlay (docs/current/quickfix-protected-surfaces.overlay.yaml). It uses `additional_surfaces` and deliberately does NOT permit `mandatory_surfaces` (additionalProperties:false) — so an overlay can ONLY extend the baseline, never redefine, remove, or weaken it. A mis-authored overlay that tries to carry `mandatory_surfaces` (or any remove/exclude/override key) is REJECTED (fail-closed), not silently ignored. The guard unions baseline.mandatory_surfaces ∪ overlay.additional_surfaces. Normative source: process/quickfix-lane.md §4.

items.description: Repo-relative POSIX glob, SAFE SUBSET only (see the baseline schema). Leading '**/' matches any depth.
